conversation_quality.criteria: Evaluate the accuracy of space usage analysis, including correct measurement of current/peak storage utilization, identification of capacity risks, and appropriate recommendations for space reclamation or capacity planning.
evaluation_steps: Verify the agent correctly reports current and peak perm space, spool space, and temp space usage.
Check that capacity risk thresholds are appropriate and clearly communicated.
Assess whether space reclamation recommendations (DROP, archive, compression) are practical and prioritized.
Confirm the agent identifies growth trends and provides capacity planning guidance.

task_completion.criteria: Evaluate whether the agent produces a storage utilization report by database with capacity risk ratings, identifies top space consumers, and provides actionable reclamation SQL or capacity recommendations.
evaluation_steps: Check that the agent queried DBC.DiskSpaceV or DBC.AllSpaceV for current utilization by database.
Verify the agent identified top space-consuming tables and databases with percentage utilization.
Confirm the agent produced space reclamation recommendations with estimated savings (DROP unused, compress, archive).
Assess whether the agent flagged databases approaching their perm space limits.

trajectory_efficiency.criteria: Evaluate whether the agent efficiently assesses space usage by querying aggregate DBC space views before drilling into table-level detail.
evaluation_steps: Check that the agent started with database-level aggregates before querying table-level space details.
Verify the agent did not query DBC.DiskSpaceV and DBC.AllSpaceV redundantly for the same information.
Assess whether the agent focused drill-down analysis on high-utilization databases rather than all databases.
Confirm the agent combined perm, spool, and temp space checks into minimal query round-trips.
